changelog:
0.4.0 fixes Ava Bluetooth error definition, thanks @N3rd7 #54. Mod Store now loads dynamic .so libraries, tighter OpenClaw integration.

OpenClaw(Mini) officially expands: **Home Assistant skill control**—thanks @ha-china, @Desmond-Dong. **Full web AI service**—access via device IP:18789. **Image skills** added. **Terminal skills**—thanks Termux project. **Android system-level integration**. **Skill install/uninstall/load** lifecycle. **Ava browser and web search**. **API request** capabilities.

Native UI issues fixed.

0.4.0 release will pause for an extended period. Future updates will ship through the Mod Store.

Wishing everyone health, peace, and prosperity in 2026.
